prompt: An anime-style movie poster featuring a bright, energetic high school girl in the foreground and a quiet high school boy in the background. The girl has long dark purple hair adorned with ribbons and musical note clips, wearing a white short-sleeved school uniform shirt, a dark plaid skirt, and a striped ribbon tie. She is smiling warmly and reaching forward, handing a piece of paper to the viewer that reads {argument name="paper text" default="この歌、あなたと、未来で届けたいです…♡"}. In the background, the boy sits at a desk, leaning his head on his hand with an aloof expression. He has messy dark hair, wears a dark blazer over a white hoodie, and has headphones around his neck. The setting is a sunlit room equipped for music production, featuring two computer monitors displaying audio waveforms, a microphone, and a keyboard. The scene features bright, cinematic lighting with lens flares and sparkling effects. Prominent text overlays include large vertical catchphrases on the left reading {argument name="vertical text" default="億再生 秘密 初恋 運命の歌"} in pink and blue, a massive stylized main title {argument name="main title" default="放課後ミリオンノート"} in the lower center with sparkling gradients, and a subtitle {argument name="subtitle" default="〜陰キャの僕が億再生ボカロPだと、歌い手志望のお嬢様だけが知っている〜"} just below it. A dense block of movie credits sits at the very bottom alongside a logo reading {argument name="studio logo" default="STELLA FILM THEATER"}.

breakdown.creativeCore: Anime Music Romance Movie Poster：Generates a cinematic anime-style promotional poster for a youth romance story centered around music production, complete with titles and credits.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
